name: White Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound White chocolate coating (wafers or block, finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter/margarine, non-dairy liquid coffee, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches 238°F on an oven thermometer (or candy thermometer).
3. Remove from heat and stir in white chocolate coating, marshmallows, vanilla, and any optional colors or flavorings (such as pink, green, yellow, butterscotch) with corresponding fruits or nuts.
4. Pour into a greased 9-inch square pan.
5. Allow to cool partially, then cut into squares.
6. For an alternative finish, roll the fudge in a log and slice before dipping pieces in additional chocolate.
This recipe makes about 64 portions.
